part.text:
---
## Goal
- Add statusThreshold time.Duration parameter to Run() method on all scheduler job types (censusJob, TokenRevocationJob, CredentialRenewalJob, etc.) throughout the repository and ensure project typechecks after changes

## Constraints & Preferences
- Make this change across the whole repository
- When complete: change is applied everywhere AND project still typechecks

## Progress
### Done
- (none)

### In Progress
- Identified all Job.Run method definitions needing modification
- censusJob.Run(ctx context.Context) in internal/census/census_job.go - needs statusThreshold param
- snapshotJob.Run(ctx context.Context) in internal/snapshot/snapshot_job.go - needs statusThreshold param
- SetSyncJob.Run() in internal/host/plugin/job_set_sync.go - needs statusThreshold param
- Need to modify 20+ job types listed in original task

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Each Job type's Run method signature will remain func(c *JobType) context.Context, error with a time.Duration statusThreshold parameter added before ctx

## Next Steps
1. Add statusThreshold time.Duration parameter to each job's Run() method
2. Update all callers of these Run methods to pass the new parameter
3. Run go vet and typecheck to verify no breakage
4. Ensure changes propagate through entire repository consistently

## Critical Context
- List of jobs modified: censusJob, TokenRevocationJob, CredentialRenewalJob, TokenRenewalJob, CredentialCleanupJob, CredentialRevocationJob, CredentialStoreCleanupJob, OrphanedHostCleanupJob, SetSyncJob, dataKeyVersionDestructionMonitorJob, tableRewrappingJob, purgeJob, cleanerJob, testJob, rotateRootsJob, upsertWorkerStorageBucketJob, deleteTerminatedJob, sessionConnectionCleanupJob, snapshotJob
- Original parameter ordering: statusThreshold time.Duration comes before ctx context.Context

## Relevant Files
- internal/census/census_job.go: censusJob definition and Run() method
- internal/credential/vault/jobs.go: TokenRevocationJob, CredentialRenewalJob, CredentialRevocationJob definitions
- internal/snapshot/snapshot_job.go: snapshotJob definition and Run() method
- internal/host/plugin/job_set_sync.go: SetSyncJob definition and Run() method
- internal/scheduler/testing.go: testJob definition
- internal/kms/data_key_version_destruction_job.go: dataKeyVersionDestructionMonitorJob
- internal/kms/job/table_rewrapping_job.go: tableRewrappingJob
- internal/pagination/purge/purge_job.go: purgeJob
- internal/recording/delete_session_recording_job.go: deleteSessionRecordingJob (cleanerJob)
- internal/scheduler/cleaner/cleaner_job.go: cleanerJob
